  Details:
  Diagnosed two defects on perch.truesight.me/large_spikes: (1) company cards vanished on 3/10/20/30-year lookbacks (period-keyed S3 cache miss — selector offers periods the refresher never caches); (2) breakout gauge hard to read (over-extended band unshaded, no numeric readout). Authored the tracked execution roadmap LARGE_SPIKES_CARD_FIX_AND_CHART_LEGIBILITY_PLAN.md (full pre-flight, one-PR-per-turn, resume tracker, UAT), registered the Sophia handoff (manifest+registry), verified both implementation PRs match the plan (ERB parses, specs real, Chart.js v2.9.3 fill correct), and surfaced the live review date 2026-07-02. Pull requests: agentic_ai_context#644, sentiment_importer#1124, sentiment_importer#1125.
